description: Looks up one registered passenger car by exact registration number (plate) and returns the core flat-view vehicle details. Use when the user provides a single number plate. Call exactly once per question — do not call this tool twice for the same plate.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE plate == ?registration_number | KEEP plate, vehicle_id, vin, brand, model, variant, year, first_reg_date, fuel, color, body_style, usage, power_kw, speed_kmh, cylinders, displacement_cc, kerb_kg, towing_kg, unbraked_towing_kg, co2_gkm, km_per_liter, euro_norm, inspection_result, inspection_date, blocking_reason, is_leased, is_veteran, is_accident_damaged | LIMIT 5

registration_number.description: Exact Danish registration number, for example EN44360
